name: ESP_ERR_NVS_BASE
comment: Starting number of error codes

name: ESP_ERR_NVS_NOT_INITIALIZED
comment: The storage driver is not initialized

name: ESP_ERR_NVS_NOT_FOUND
comment: A requested entry couldn't be found or namespace doesn’t exist yet and mode is NVS_READONLY

name: ESP_ERR_NVS_TYPE_MISMATCH
comment: The type of set or get operation doesn't match the type of value stored in NVS

name: ESP_ERR_NVS_READ_ONLY
comment: Storage handle was opened as read only

name: ESP_ERR_NVS_NOT_ENOUGH_SPACE
comment: There is not enough space in the underlying storage to save the value

name: ESP_ERR_NVS_INVALID_NAME
comment: Namespace name doesn’t satisfy constraints

name: ESP_ERR_NVS_INVALID_HANDLE
comment: Handle has been closed or is NULL

name: ESP_ERR_NVS_REMOVE_FAILED
comment: The value wasn’t updated because flash write operation has failed. The value was written however, and update will be finished after re-initialization of nvs, provided that flash operation doesn’t fail again.

name: ESP_ERR_NVS_KEY_TOO_LONG
comment: Key name is too long

name: ESP_ERR_NVS_PAGE_FULL
comment: Internal error; never returned by nvs API functions

name: ESP_ERR_NVS_INVALID_STATE
comment: NVS is in an inconsistent state due to a previous error. Call nvs_flash_init and nvs_open again, then retry.

name: ESP_ERR_NVS_INVALID_LENGTH
comment: String or blob length is not sufficient to store data

name: ESP_ERR_NVS_NO_FREE_PAGES
comment: NVS partition doesn't contain any empty pages. This may happen if NVS partition was truncated. Erase the whole partition and call nvs_flash_init again.

name: ESP_ERR_NVS_VALUE_TOO_LONG
comment: Value doesn't fit into the entry or string or blob length is longer than supported by the implementation

name: ESP_ERR_NVS_PART_NOT_FOUND
comment: Partition with specified name is not found in the partition table

name: ESP_ERR_NVS_NEW_VERSION_FOUND
comment: NVS partition contains data in new format and cannot be recognized by this version of code

name: ESP_ERR_NVS_XTS_ENCR_FAILED
comment: XTS encryption failed while writing NVS entry

name: ESP_ERR_NVS_XTS_DECR_FAILED
comment: XTS decryption failed while reading NVS entry

name: ESP_ERR_NVS_XTS_CFG_FAILED
comment: XTS configuration setting failed

name: ESP_ERR_NVS_XTS_CFG_NOT_FOUND
comment: XTS configuration not found

name: ESP_ERR_NVS_ENCR_NOT_SUPPORTED
comment: NVS encryption is not supported in this version

name: ESP_ERR_NVS_KEYS_NOT_INITIALIZED
comment: NVS key partition is uninitialized

name: ESP_ERR_NVS_CORRUPT_KEY_PART
comment: NVS key partition is corrupt

name: ESP_ERR_NVS_CONTENT_DIFFERS
comment: Internal error; never returned by nvs API functions.  NVS key is different in comparison

name: ESP_ERR_NVS_WRONG_ENCRYPTION
comment: NVS partition is marked as encrypted with generic flash encryption. This is forbidden since the NVS encryption works differently.
